# Brazilian Localization Sales and Warehouse

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:6caf227edb60b685df07f1b80681e366eae20f0674437e09fb2000c812a0ca84
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module extends the standard Odoo sale stock module for Brazil, specially when selling products with NFe's.

It deals with the propagation of the fiscal operation, fiscal comment and incoterms to invoice created direct from sale
order or picking.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Installation

This module depends on:

- sale_stock
- l10n_br_sale
- l10n_br_stock_account

## Configuration

No configuration required.

## Changelog

### 12.0.1.0.0 (2020-05-29)

### 10.0.1.0.0 (2019-09-13)

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_sale_stock.models.stock_picking.StockPicking._get_partner_to_invoice
documentation:
If the partner has some invoicing contact defined
partner_invoice_id is auto filled, but it can also be changed.
partner_invoice_id is used if different from partner_id

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_sale_stock.models.stock_move.StockMove._get_fiscal_partner
documentation: Use partner_invoice_id if different from partner

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_sale_stock.models.sale_order_line.SaleOrderLine._get_to_invoice_qty
documentation:
Compute the quantity to invoice. If the invoice policy is order,
the quantity to invoice is calculated from the ordered quantity.
Otherwise, the quantity delivered is used.
no trigger product_id.invoice_policy to avoid retroactively changing SO

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_sale_stock.models.sale_order.SaleOrder._onchange_partner_shipping_id
documentation:
Caso ocorra a alteração do campo Endereço de Entrega/partner_shipping_id
depois do Pedido confirmado os stock.picking relacionados ficam com o
partner_id anterior, o que é errado, o metodo original apenas mostra uma
mensagem de alerta na tela orientando o usuário a corrigir manualmente,
mas como na localização com esse modulo pode se definir a criação da
Invoice a partir do stock.picking é melhor garantir a alteração do campo
partner_id da stock.picking afim de evitar erros na criação da Invoice.
\:return: super()

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_sale_stock.wizards.stock_invoice_onshipping.StockInvoiceOnshipping._build_invoice_values_from_pickings
documentation:
Build dict to create a new invoice from given pickings
\:param pickings: stock.picking recordset
\:return: dict

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_sale_stock.wizards.stock_invoice_onshipping.StockInvoiceOnshipping._get_move_key
documentation:
Get the key based on the given move
\:param move: stock.move recordset
\:return: key

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_sale_stock.wizards.stock_invoice_onshipping.StockInvoiceOnshipping._get_invoice_line_values
documentation:
Create invoice line values from given moves
\:param moves: stock.move
\:param invoice: account.invoice
\:return: dict

modules.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_sale_stock.tests.test_sale_stock
documentation: TODO: In v16 check the possiblity to use the commom.py

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_sale_stock.tests.test_sale_stock.TestSaleStock.test_02_sale_stock_return
documentation:
Test a SO with a product invoiced on delivery. Deliver and invoice
the SO, then do a return
of the picking. Check that a refund invoice is well generated.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_sale_stock.tests.test_sale_stock.TestSaleStock.test_picking_sale_order_product_and_service
documentation: Test Sale Order with product and service

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_sale_stock.tests.test_sale_stock.TestSaleStock.test_picking_invoicing_partner_shipping_invoiced
documentation:
Test the invoice generation grouped by partner/product with 2
picking and 3 moves per picking, but Partner to Shipping is
different from Partner to Invoice.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_sale_stock.tests.test_sale_stock.TestSaleStock.test_ungrouping_pickings_partner_shipping_different
documentation:
Test the invoice generation grouped by partner/product with 3
picking and 3 moves per picking, the 3 has the same Partner to
Invoice but one has Partner to Shipping so shouldn't be grouping.

methods.name: odoo.addons.l10n_br_sale_stock.tests.test_sale_stock.TestSaleStock.test_synchronize_sale_partner_shipping_in_stock_picking
documentation: Test the synchronize Sale Partner Shipping in Stock Picking

documentation: Test Field to make Button Create Bill invisible.
